rationale: Both reviews catch the material scope problem visible in the diff: Layer-5/6-style IsUnipotent/ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup shells, including True placeholders, are premature and should be removed or deferred. Review 1 would leave a tighter Layer-0-style PR, while Review 2 adds an AffineAlgGroup splitting demand that cannot be confirmed from the shown diff and may create unnecessary churn.
